name: Chicken Casserole for a Crowd
recipeIngredient: 2 bunches Green onions with tops, sliced
2 cans Chopped green chiles (4 oz each)
1 can Pitted ripe olives, drained and sliced (5 3/4 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first six ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Add 2 cups of cheese to the mixture.
3. Mix together the mayonnaise and sour cream separately.
4. Stir the mayo/sour cream mix into the chicken mixture until well combined.
5. Divide the mixture evenly between two greased 13"x9"x2" baking dishes.
6. Sprinkle each dish with crushed potato chips.
7. Top each with the remaining cheese.
8. Bake uncovered at 350°F for 20-25 minutes, or until hot.
